description_long: This is a modern sport motorcycle with a streamlined, aerodynamic design and a striking red and black color scheme. The bodywork features sharp, angular fairings, a prominent fuel tank, and a compact tail section with a raised rear seat. The front end is equipped with a clear windscreen, dual side mirrors, and aggressive headlights, while the rear includes a single-sided swingarm and a visible chain drive. The wheels are large, with low-profile tires and disc brakes, and the motorcycle is supported by a rear paddock stand. The handlebars are low and forward, typical of sport bikes, and the exhaust system is tucked neatly under the bodywork. The overall appearance suggests high performance and agility, suitable for urban streets or racetracks.
description: A sleek, red and black sport motorcycle with aerodynamic fairings, low handlebars, and a compact, aggressive profile. Features include a clear windscreen, dual mirrors, and a rear paddock stand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the motorcycle, highlighting the aerodynamic fairings, fuel tank, and rear paddock stand.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the windscreen, dual mirrors, aggressive headlights, and the narrow profile of the front tire.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the chain drive, single-sided swingarm, and detailed wheel components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the compact tail section, rear tire, and the paddock stand supporting the motorcycle.
